_comment: Synthetic Scapia / Federal Bank credit-card golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's federal_scapia.py reader; values captured from a live run of the web reader. Layout: DD-MM-YYYY·HH:MM <description> [+]₹<amount> — the separator between date and time is a middle dot (U+00B7) and the amount is prefixed by the rupee sign (U+20B9); a leading '+' is Scapia's own credit marker, otherwise the transaction type decides. Billing cycle like '20Apr2026-19May2026'; the card is fully masked (XXXXXXXXXXXX4836).
full_text:
Scapia by Federal Bank
